---
title: Fleurs humaines
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810118/fleurs_jlhm2l.png
description: fleurs curieuses
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2026-01-17
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810118/fleurs_jlhm2l.png)
